name: TextReveal

<TextReveal Text="The Blazor component library designed for modern applications."
             Class="text-3xl font-bold leading-tight" Stagger="80" />

mdSummary:
# TextReveal

Word-by-word reveal animation on scroll.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/text-reveal

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| TextReveal | Text | `string` | `string.Empty` |  |
| TextReveal | Stagger | `int` | `80` |  |
| TextReveal | Threshold | `double` | `0.3` |  |
| TextReveal | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TextReveal | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<TextReveal />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/TextReveal/TextReveal.razor`
